app.name: Vansh Vriksh
app.tagline: Apne purvajo ki virasat ko digital karo
app.sevaSlogan: Seva Paramo Dharmah — Service hi sabse bada dharm hai

landing.heroSubtitle: Apne purvajo ki virasat ko digital karo
landing.aboutDesc2: WhatsApp pe link bhejo, family judti jayegi. A platform where your entire family connects in one tree.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Indian families ke liye, Indian rishtey ke saath
landing.feature1Desc: Dada-Dadi, Bua-Fufa, Sala-Sali, Devrani-Jethani, Bhatija-Bhatiji, Nati-Natin — sab included hai. No Western app covers these.
landing.feature2Desc: Gotra, Kul Devi, Jati, Nakshatra, Rashi — puri Hindu identity ek jagah
landing.feature3Desc: Beti ki shaadi hui? Dono family ke trees aapas mein jud jate hain — cross-tree marriage links
landing.feature4Desc: Father, Dada, Pardada — 3 generations ki tithi aur teerth sthal ek click mein
landing.feature5Desc: Aapka data sirf aapka. Gotra ke according hi dikhta hai — no public exposure
landing.featurePills: WhatsApp Share,Bilingual Hindi/English,Offline Ready (PWA),Elder-Friendly,Multiple Marriages,Recycle Bin,Soft Delete,7 Generations,Gotra Discovery
landing.step1Detail: Apna email daalo, magic link aayega. Click karo — bas!
landing.step1En: Enter email, click magic link — done in 30 seconds
landing.step2Detail: Dada-Dadi se shuru karo, ek-ek karke member add karo. Gotra, Kul Devi, sab bharo.
landing.step2En: Add members one by one — name, relation, gotra, everything
landing.step3Detail: Link bhejo, family dekhega aur judti jayegi. Tree badhta rahega!
landing.step3En: Share link — family joins and tree keeps growing
landing.demoSubtitle: Interactive example — cards tap karo details ke liye
landing.demoFooter: Ye example hai. Apna tree isse bhi bada banao!
landing.before1: Bacchon ko dada-pardada ke naam nahi pata
landing.before2: Shraddh ki tithi bhool jaate hain
landing.before3: Kagaz ke records kho jaate hain
landing.before4: Shaadi ke baad maike ka naam mit jaata hai
landing.before5: Peedhiyon ki jaankari sirf buzurgo tak
landing.before6: Kul Devi-Gotra nayi peedhi ko pata nahi
landing.after1: 7 peedhiyon ka pura record — digital, hamesha safe
landing.after2: Shraddh helper — tithi, teerth sthal ek click mein
landing.after5: WhatsApp se pura family jud sakta hai
landing.after6: Gotra, Kul Devi, Nakshatra — sab recorded
landing.sevaDesc: Ye koi business nahi hai. Ye seva hai. No ads, no premium, no data selling. Bas family ko jodna.
landing.faq1A: Haan, 100% free. Koi hidden charges nahi, koi premium plan nahi, koi ads nahi. Ye seva hai, business nahi.
landing.faq2Q: Mera data kaun dekh sakta hai?
landing.faq2A: Sirf aapke family ke members. Gotra-based privacy — outsiders sirf tree metadata (surname, gaon) dekh sakte hain, koi personal info nahi.
landing.faq3Q: Buzurgo ko phone chalana nahi aata — kya kare?
landing.faq3A: Bacche ya pote dada-dadi ka data add kar sakte hain. Buzurgo ko khud account banana zaroori nahi.
landing.faq4Q: Agar mera tree pehle se bana ho?
landing.faq4QEn: What if my tree already exists?
landing.faq4A: Pehle search karo! Naam, gotra, gaon se search karo. Agar mil jaye to Join karo — duplicate nahi banega.
landing.faq5Q: Shaadi ke baad maike ka naam mit jayega?
landing.faq5QEn: Will maiden name be lost after marriage?
landing.faq5A: Kabhi nahi! Maiden name (née tag) hamesha preserved rehta hai. Married women apna display name choose kar sakti hain.
landing.faq6A: PWA (Progressive Web App) — ek baar khulne ke baad offline bhi kaam karta hai. Add to Home Screen karo!
landing.ctaSmall: No signup needed to search. Create your tree in 5 minutes.
landing.footerBuilt: Built with love as Seva by UnfoldCRO

features.relationsDesc: Dada-Dadi, Bua-Fufa, Sala-Sali, Devrani-Jethani — sab included

features.shraddhDesc: Father, Dada, Pardada — 3 generations ek click mein
features.privacyDesc: Aapka data sirf aapka. Gotra ke according dikhta hai
features.eldersDesc: Bacche dada-dadi ka data add kar sakte hain

steps.step2: Family Add Karo (5 minute per member)
steps.step3: WhatsApp pe Share — Family judti jayegi

auth.emailNote: Hum aapko ek magic link bhejenge. Link pe click karo aur login ho jayega.
auth.linkSentNote: Apna email check karo aur link pe click karo.
auth.linkExpired: Link expired ya invalid hai. Please dobara bhejo.
auth.alreadyExists: Ye account pehle se hai. Login karo.
